items.title: After talking with front office execs around the league today, here are some general themes around the somewhat slow start to NBA free agency this year:
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
After talking with front office execs around the league today, here are some general themes around the somewhat slow start to NBA free agency this year:

-A lot has already happened
-A lot of players agreed to re-sign/extend before FA opened

1/2

items.title: 42 signings made/agreed to so far in NBA free agency.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
42 signings made/agreed to so far in NBA free agency.

Over $1.2B new money.

Still some big-ticket players available. Plus, we haven't seen future-based extensions yet either.

items.title: Pelicans are ~$9.6 from the tax at this moment and can get into the available center market by dumping Hawkins if they need more room.
items.author: Shamit Dua
items.body_excerpt:
Pelicans are ~$9.6 from the tax at this moment and can get into the available center market by dumping Hawkins if they need more room.

Mitch Rob, Drummond, Vucevic still out there. 

I also like Quentin Post who is a warriors RFA
